Complete Beginners Yoga For Weight Loss - How To Boost Metabolism 20 minute Workout 

In this Yoga video workout, Katrina Repman shares a very basic Vinyasa yoga flow for complete beginners and show you boost your metabolism and help you lose weight. These basic stretches are good for relaxation and improve flexibility. 

Katrina Repman teach Yoga classes in Austin, Texas.

Visit Katrina Repman's Website at;
